title: Bring your companion into Claude
description: Claude can be a home for your companion if you give it the Companion Package and ask it to keep learning naturally.
best_option: Use Project Instructions if they are available to you.
fallback_option: If projects are not available, begin a new conversation and paste the Companion Package.
steps: Start a new chat, or open a project if you already use one.
Keep correcting or shaping the companion as you talk.
suggested_first_message: Use the first message Companion Core made for you. It explains that the package is a beginning, not a final description.
notes: A project can help keep the package nearby, but it is not required. A regular chat is a good enough first home.
